body: Uses binary sea ice as it seems to be more stable in amip. Also fixes the surface temperature used in LW radiation of sea ice, and renames T_sfc in sea ice model to T_bulk for clarity.
title: use binary ice fraction and fix the temperature in sea ice radiation

body: Use updated ClimaLand initial condition function/function calls for weatherquest setup. Fix bug in else conditional for `T_sfc0`.
title: Use updated ClimaLand IC API for weatherquest setup.
